_what_is_this: This file tells the browser how to install your app on a phone's home screen. When a user visits your site on mobile and sees 'Add to Home Screen', this file controls what the app looks like after installation.
name: done. — Personal Todo
description: Your personal todo app with reminders and notifications
_display_note: standalone = the app opens without browser address bar/tabs, just like a native app. Other options: fullscreen, minimal-ui, browser
_theme_color_note: Colour of the status bar / browser chrome on Android. We use dark to match our app header.
_background_color_note: Shown briefly while the app is loading (the splash screen background).
_icons_note: You need to create these icon files. Use any image editor or https://realfavicongenerator.net — upload a square image of the 'done.' wordmark and it generates all sizes.
_shortcuts_note: Long-pressing the app icon on Android shows these quick actions.
